summary: Comprehensive testing of Weekly Check-In and Round Robin Scheduler features. All 12 requested features tested and working. Backend 100% pass rate (39/39 tests), Frontend all flows working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Existing event 'Sunday Doubles - Apr 19' with 7 players checked in, approved, and schedule generated. Test event for Apr 26 was created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 weekly check-in and round robin features tested successfully. Backend tests cover: WeeklyEvent CRUD (admin-only create), Check-in system (available/maybe/not_available statuses), time-gated check-in window (Wednesday 7AM Eastern), admin approval flow, admin override, generate doubles schedule (requires 4+ approved), cancel player with auto-promote from waitlist. Frontend tests cover: Schedule page with upcoming events, check-in buttons, admin-only Create Sunday Event panel, Admin Controls section with check-in stats and approval buttons, generated doubles round robin display with rounds/courts/teams/byes.

1_backend_create_weekly_event.details: Admin-only endpoint creates event with status 'open', empty approved/waitlist arrays

2_backend_get_upcoming_events.details: Returns events sorted by date ascending, filters to today and future

3_backend_submit_checkin.details: Supports available/maybe/not_available statuses, validates check-in window (Wednesday 7AM)

4_backend_get_checkins.details: Returns all check-ins for an event with user_id, user_name, status

5_backend_approve_players.details: Admin-only, sets approved_players and waitlist_players arrays, changes status to 'approved'

6_backend_generate_schedule.details: Admin-only, requires 4+ approved players, generates doubles round robin with partner rotation and fair bye distribution

7_backend_cancel_player.details: Removes player from approved list, auto-promotes first waitlisted player

8_frontend_schedule_page.details: Shows upcoming Sunday events with event cards, calendar with highlighted dates

9_frontend_admin_create_panel.details: Admin sees 'Create Sunday Event' panel with date input and create button, hidden from members

10_frontend_generated_schedule.details: Doubles round robin schedule displays with rounds, times, courts, team matchups (Team A vs Team B), and bye players

11_frontend_checkin_buttons.details: Available/Maybe/Not Available buttons visible when check-in window is open, shows 'Check-in opens Wednesday' message when closed

12_frontend_admin_controls.details: Admin Controls section shows check-in stats (Available/Maybe/Approved counts), player lists with badges, Approve All button, Generate Schedule button, Delete Event button

doubles_round_robin_algorithm_verified.partner_rotation: Verified - players paired with different partners each round
doubles_round_robin_algorithm_verified.bye_distribution: Verified - with 7 players and 1 court, 3 players sit out each round, distributed fairly
doubles_round_robin_algorithm_verified.schedule_structure: Verified - rounds contain matches with court assignments, team_a, team_b, and byes array
